api: Microsoft Advertising (Bing Ads) v13 Customer Management and Campaign Management REST APIs
scope: Migration of the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (accounts, users, campaigns, ad_groups, ads), matching internal/connectors/bing-ads's exact routing table. Microsoft Advertising's full documented API surface (Bulk service, Reporting service, Ad Insight service, campaign/ad-group/ad/keyword mutations) is out of scope until Pass B; legacy itself is also read-only (Write always returns ErrUnsupportedOperation). Every covered/excluded READ entry below is declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST for these '.../Query'-style endpoints) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design SS E.1 rule 4) -- matching monday's identical convention for its GraphQL-over-POST surface. Genuine mutation endpoints (AddCampaigns/UpdateAdGroups/DeleteAds) keep their real wire verb since they are excluded, not covered.

excluded.reason: Pass B capability expansion; not read by legacy
